chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 48 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case. For hearing of main case. -------------- 21.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Fahad Pirzada, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondent. ----------------- Mr. Muhammad Fahad Pirzada, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of the Applicant superseding the earlier Counsel, which is taken on record. However, perusal of the impugned order reflects that this Reference Application is against an interim order of the Tribunal on some miscellaneous application; whereby, directions were given to the Commissioner to decide the pending appeal. The said appeal, as informed, stands decided; therefore, this Reference Application is misconceived and is hereby dismissed. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz
